entities.name: JATROPHA CURCAS
entities.description: A non-edible oilseed crop used as a promising alternative energy source due to high seed oil content and adaptability.

entities.name: SEED OIL CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of oil contained within the seeds of a plant.

entities.name: RAPID GROWTH
entities.description: The ability of a plant to grow quickly.

entities.name: ADAPTABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of a plant to adapt to various environments.

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of determining the complete DNA sequence of an organism's genome.

entities.name: PACBIO
entities.description: A sequencing platform used for generating long reads for genome assembly.

entities.name: ILLUMINA
entities.description: A sequencing platform used for high-throughput short-read sequencing.

entities.name: DIFFERENTIALLY EXPRESSED GENES
entities.description: Genes that show statistically significant differences in expression levels across different conditions or stages.

entities.name: LIPID BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The biological process of synthesizing lipids.

entities.name: TOXIC COMPOUND
entities.description: Harmful chemical substances produced by the plant.

entities.name: SEED DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The biological process of seed growth and maturation.

entities.name: TRIACYLGLYCEROL
entities.description: The major component of seed storage oil, also known as TAG.

entities.name: PHOSPHOLIPID:DIACYLGLYCEROL ACYLTRANSFERASE
entities.description: An enzyme mainly responsible for the synthesis of triacylglycerol in Jatropha.

entities.name: OLEOSIN
entities.description: Proteins that prevent the breakdown of triacylglycerol, contributing to high oil accumulation in kernels.

entities.name: DITERPENOID BIOSYNTHETIC ENZYMES
entities.description: A cluster of enzymes involved in the biosynthesis of diterpenoids.

entities.name: CASBENE SYNTHASES
entities.description: Enzymes within the diterpenoid biosynthetic cluster highly responsible for producing phorbol ester.

entities.name: PHORBOL ESTER
entities.description: A specific toxic compound found in the seed cake of Jatropha.

entities.name: SEED CAKE
entities.description: The residue remaining after oil has been extracted from seeds.

entities.name: CASTOR BEAN
entities.description: A plant that shows high syntenic conservation of diterpenoid biosynthetic enzymes with Jatropha.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of RNA transcripts produced by the genome under specific conditions.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTION FACTORS
entities.description: Proteins that control the rate of transcription of genetic information from DNA to messenger RNA.

entities.name: SPECIES TREE
entities.description: A phylogenetic tree representing the evolutionary relationships and divergence times among species.

entities.name: MALPIGHIALES
entities.description: The taxonomic order to which Jatropha and several commercial crops belong.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of agricultural product produced per unit area.
